about-site-brief.title: About This Site
about-site-brief.text-1: This portfolio summarizes the works I have worked on and the skills I have acquired.
about-site-brief.text-2: Hope you will get to know me as much as possible through this portfolio.

skills-brief.title: Skills Brief
skills-brief.text-1: I Have been working on a wide range of skill improvements from the front to the back end.
skills-brief.text-2: Although it is wide and shallow, I would like to continue to challenge a wide range of fields and continue to do my best.

works-brief.title: Works Brief
works-brief.text-1: I have practiced and experienced a wide range from the front to the back end.
works-brief.text-2: While working on the project, I will update the collection of works irregularly from now on.
